StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT ISNULL(cc.definition,N'') AS [ComputedText] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.all_columns AS clmns ON clmns.object_id=tbl.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.computed_columns AS cc ON cc.object_id = clmns.object_id and cc.column_id = clmns.column_id WHERE (clmns.name=@_msparam_0)and((tbl.name=@_msparam_1 and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id)=@_msparam_2))

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

CONVERT(nvarchar(128),[mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[name],0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nvarchar(4000),[@_msparam_0],0) AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))
